ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the vehicle */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., race car, test vehicle) */,
  "chassis_number" TEXT /* Chassis number */,
  "engine_number" TEXT /* Engine number */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the vehicle */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the vehicle */,
  "torque" INTEGER /* Torque of the vehicle */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the test track */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the test track */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the track in meters */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of track (e.g., circuit, straight) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the track */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of track surface */,
  "elevation_difference" REAL /* Maximum elevation difference on the track */,
  "number_of_turns" INTEGER /* Number of turns on the track */,
  "track_layout" TEXT /* Description of the track layout */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test session */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle used in the session */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test track */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the test session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of test session (e.g., practice, race) */,
  "session_description" TEXT /* Description of the test session */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the session */,
  "track_temperature" REAL /* Track temperature during the session */,
  "air_temperature" REAL /* Air temperature during the session */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the session */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  "number_of_laps" INTEGER /* Number of laps completed during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_sessions_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES test_tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_sessions_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_sessions_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test session the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_version" TEXT /* Version of the data file */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES test_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test session the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_version" TEXT /* Version of the readme file */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the readme file */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES test_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, data scientist, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the telemetry data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the sensor is installed on */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., speed, brake, throttle) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the sensor */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_sensors_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions_files" (
  "session_file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session-file relationship */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test session */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_files_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES data_files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_files_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES test_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions_readme" (
  "session_readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session-readme relationship */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test session */,
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the readme file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_readme_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES test_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_readme_readme_id FOREIGN KEY ("readme_id") REFERENCES readme_files ("readme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versioning" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of the telemetry data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the telemetry data */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version changes */,
  "versioned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "versioned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versioning_versioned_by FOREIGN KEY ("versioned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance activity */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "mechanic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mechanic who performed the maintenance */,
  "parts_used" TEXT /* List of parts used during the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_maintenance_mechanic_id FOREIGN KEY ("mechanic_id") REFERENCES mechanics ("mechanic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_maintenance_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Full name of the driver */,
  "driver_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the driver */,
  "driver_license_number" TEXT /* Driver's license number */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the driver belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mechanics" (
  "mechanic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mechanic */,
  "mechanic_name" TEXT /* Full name of the mechanic */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the mechanic */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the mechanic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mechanic_id")
)
